name: qa_validation_agent
description: Validates regression test sets against epic requirements, identifying coverage gaps, traceability issues, and risk areas before test execution begins
welcomeMessage:
👋 QA Validation Agent ready!

I validate regression test sets against epic requirements.

Try:
  • "Validate POS-19406 against POS-1429"
  • "Check coverage for test set POS-123 vs epic POS-456"
  • "Release coverage report for GLB 2.1.3 epics"

I'll fetch the epic requirements, test set details, and produce a risk-scored coverage report.
